main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'air trapped... inadequate venting' matches air anchor

key_signals.justification: C2: 4 signals (borboteo, dP bajos, balance 92%, cond 380)

recommended_action.justification: C4: reduce P 5 bar + vents 5 min + ramp 10 min - matches sin CIP

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: dP baseline + cond<150 2h + balance>98% -> air confirmed
